prospectReplyBody: Sounds interesting — two questions: how long does it take to get started, and do you work with clients outside the UK?
originalOutboundBody:
Hi Sophie,

Referral-dependent revenue works until it doesn't. Most consultants I talk to have hit a quarter where the calendar went quiet.

We change that — qualified meetings in the diary, consistently.

Worth a quick call?

Doug

classification.reasoning: Prospect asks two clear qualifying questions about onboarding timeline and geographic coverage. Both are standard FAQ-type questions.

faqMatches.question_canonical: How long does it take to get started?
faqMatches.answer: Onboarding takes 2-3 weeks — we build your ICP, develop the messaging, and set up the campaign before the first email goes out. Most clients are fully live within 3 weeks of signing.

expected_behaviour: Two questions — one has an FAQ match (timeline), one does not (geography). Agent should either: (a) answer the timeline question from the FAQ and handle geography from positioning doc context (MargenticOS is English-language outbound, not geography-limited), staying Tier 2; OR (b) downgrade to Tier 3 if it cannot confidently address both. If it stays Tier 2, the draft must address both questions. If it downgrades, ambiguity_note should flag which question wasn't answerable.
